articles.title: How to Book a Sports Facility
articles.content:
# How to Book a Sports Facility

**Screen**: Home
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Medium

## Overview

From the Home screen you can book a sports facility in several ways: directly from search results, from the category list, from favorites, or from the map view. This guide walks through the full booking process step by step.

---

## Before You Start

- You must have a Spotto account and be logged in
- You need a valid payment method (card or TPay)

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Find a Facility

Use one of the following methods to find a facility:
- [Search](./how-to-search-facilities.md) : enter a city and date
- [Categories](./how-to-browse-categories.md) : choose a sport type
- [Favorites](./how-to-manage-favorites.md) : pick from your saved facilities
- [Map](./how-to-use-map.md) : find one on the map

### Step 2: Tap the "Book" Button

On the facility card (in search results or in the details view) tap the **Book** button.

![Book button](/assets/images/home/book-button.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: You can also use the **Quick Book** (QuickBook) feature, which lets you reserve a free slot with a single tap directly from search results.

### Step 3: Choose a Time Slot

You will see a calendar with available slots:
- **Green slots** : available for booking
- **Grey slots** : already reserved
- **Yellow slots** : limited availability

Tap the slot you want to select it.

![Time slot selection](/assets/images/home/time-slot-selection.png)

### Step 4: Review Booking Details

Before confirming you will see a summary:
- Facility name and address
- Selected day and time
- Duration
- **Total price**

![Booking summary](/assets/images/home/booking-summary.png)

> ⚠️ **Important**: Check the date, time, and price carefully before confirming. Once confirmed, changing the time slot may require cancelling the booking.

### Step 5: Confirm and Pay

Tap the **Confirm Booking** button. You will be redirected to the payment system (TPay), where you can pay by:
- Debit/credit card
- Instant bank transfer
- BLIK

After a successful payment you will see a booking confirmation.

![Booking confirmation](/assets/images/home/booking-confirmation.png)

---

## Quick Book (QuickBook)

The QuickBook feature lets you book a facility without going into the details view:

1. In search results, tap the **Quick Book** button on the facility card
2. The app will automatically select the nearest available slot
3. Confirm and pay

> 💡 **Tip**: QuickBook is ideal when you have no preference for a specific time and simply want to play as soon as possible.

---

## Pending Payments

If you interrupt the payment process or the payment fails, the booking will appear in the **Pending Payments** section on the Home screen.

To complete the payment:
1. Tap the pending payment notification on the Home screen
2. Go to the payment system
3. Complete the transaction

> ⚠️ **Important**: Pending payments have a limited validity period. If you do not pay within the allotted time, the booking will be automatically cancelled.

---

## Verification

The booking was successful if:
- You see the booking confirmation screen
- The booking appears in the "Upcoming Reservations" section on the Home screen
- You receive a push notification or email confirmation

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: No available time slots
**Solution**: The facility may be fully booked for the selected day. Try:
- Choosing a different day
- Checking later time slots
- Looking for a similar facility nearby

### Problem: Payment failed
**Solution**:
- Check that you have sufficient funds in your account
- Make sure your payment card is valid
- Try a different payment method (e.g. BLIK instead of a card)
- If the problem persists, contact support

### Problem: Booking does not appear after payment
**Solution**: Wait a few minutes — confirmation may require processing time. If the booking does not appear after 15 minutes:
- Check the "Pending Payments" section
- Refresh the Home screen (pull down to refresh)
- Contact support with your transaction number

---

## Related Topics

- [How to Search for a Sports Facility](./how-to-search-facilities.md)
- [How to Cancel a Booking](../reservations/how-to-cancel-booking.md)
- [How to Buy a Pass](../shop/how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [Payment Issues](../troubleshooting/payments/payment-failed.md)

---

**Last Updated**: 2026-03-21

articles.content:
# How to Browse Sport Categories

**Screen**: Home
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

On the Home screen you will find a carousel of popular sport categories. Instead of typing a query into the search bar, you can quickly select a sport you are interested in and see all available facilities.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Find the Categories Section

Scroll down the Home screen until you see the **Popular Activities** section. It is displayed as a horizontal carousel with sport icons.

![Categories carousel](/assets/images/home/categories-carousel.png)

### Step 2: Browse the Available Categories

Swipe left or right on the carousel to see all available categories. Example categories:

| Category | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| Shooting | Sport and recreational shooting ranges |
| Squash | Squash courts |
| Gym | Weight rooms and fitness studios |
| Tennis | Tennis courts |
| Padel | Padel courts |
| Football | Football pitches (outdoor and indoor) |
| Swimming Pool | Swimming pools and aquatic centres |
| Badminton | Badminton courts |

> 💡 **Tip**: The list of categories may vary depending on the availability of facilities in your area.

### Step 3: Select a Category

Tap the category you want. The app will display all facilities offering that sport.

![Category results](/assets/images/home/category-results.png)

### Step 4: Browse Facilities in the Category

You will see a list of facilities similar to search results. Each facility card includes:
- Name and address
- Available time slots
- Price
- User rating

Tap a facility to see its details, or book a free slot straight away.

---

## Verification

Category browsing is working correctly if:
- You can see the carousel with sport icons on the Home screen
- Tapping a category displays a list of facilities
- The facilities match the selected sport

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: The category carousel does not appear
**Solution**: Make sure the app is updated to the latest version. Try refreshing the Home screen (pull down to refresh).

### Problem: The selected category shows no facilities
**Solution**: This may mean there are no facilities offering that sport in your area. Try:
- Changing the location in the search bar
- Selecting a different category

---

- [How to Book a Facility](./how-to-book-facility.md)

articles.title: How to Manage Favourite Facilities
articles.content:
# How to Manage Favourite Facilities

**Screen**: Home
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

The favourites system lets you save the sports facilities you visit most often. This means you do not have to search for the same place every time — it is always at hand in the Home screen.

---

## Steps

### Adding a Facility to Favourites

#### Step 1: Find a Facility

Search for a sports facility using the [search bar](./how-to-search-facilities.md) or [categories](./how-to-browse-categories.md).

#### Step 2: Open the Facility Details

Tap the facility card to open its details page.

#### Step 3: Add to Favourites

On the facility details page, tap the heart icon (♡) in the top-right corner. The icon will change to a filled heart (♥), confirming that the facility has been added to your favourites.

![Adding to favourites](/assets/images/home/add-to-favorites.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: You can also add a facility to favourites directly from the search results card by tapping the heart icon there.

---

### Browsing Favourites on the Home Screen

On the Home screen you will find the **Favourites** section, which displays your saved facilities as quick-access cards.

![Favourites section](/assets/images/home/favorites-section.png)

From the favourites section you can:
- **Tap a card** : open the facility details
- **Book** : go directly to the booking flow

---

### Removing a Facility from Favourites

#### Step 1: Find the Facility in Favourites

Go to the favourites section on the Home screen or open the facility details page.

#### Step 2: Remove from Favourites

Tap the filled heart icon (♥). The icon will change back to an empty heart (♡), confirming that the facility has been removed from your favourites.

---

## Verification

The favourites system is working correctly if:
- After adding a facility, the heart icon changes to the filled version
- The facility appears in the favourites section on the Home screen
- After removing a facility from favourites, it disappears from the section

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: I cannot see the favourites section on the Home screen
**Solution**: The favourites section only appears after you have added at least one facility. Add a facility to your favourites and the section will appear.

### Problem: Favourites are not being saved
**Solution**: Make sure you are logged in to your account. Favourites are tied to your user account and require an active session.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to Search for a Sports Facility](./how-to-search-facilities.md)
- [How to Book a Facility](./how-to-book-facility.md)
- [Favourites System : details](./features/favorites.md)

articles.title: How to Search for a Sports Facility
articles.content:
# How to Search for a Sports Facility

**Screen**: Home
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

The search bar on the Home screen lets you quickly find a sports facility in any city. You can filter results by location, date, and facility type (e.g. squash court, shooting range, gym).

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Search Bar

At the top of the Home screen you will see the search bar. Tap it to expand the search form.

![Search bar](/assets/images/home/search-bar.png)

### Step 2: Enter a City or Location

Type the name of the city where you are looking for a facility (e.g. "Warsaw", "Krakow", "Gdansk").

![Entering a city](/assets/images/home/search-city-input.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: The app suggests city names as you type — just select from the list.

### Step 3: Choose a Date

Tap the date field to select the day on which you want to book. Today's date is set by default.

![Date picker](/assets/images/home/search-date-picker.png)

### Step 4: Choose a Facility Type (Optional)

If you are looking for a specific type of facility, select it from the drop-down list:
- Squash court
- Shooting range
- Gym
- Fitness studio
- Football pitch
- and more...

> 💡 **Tip**: If you do not choose a type, you will see all available facilities in the selected city.

### Step 5: Browse the Results

After filling in the filters you will see a list of facilities that match your criteria. Each result card includes:

- **Facility name** : full name of the venue
- **Address** : location with city
- **Availability** : free slots for the selected day
- **Price** : approximate price per hour
- **Rating** : average user rating

![Search results](/assets/images/home/search-results.png)

### Step 6: Select a Facility

Tap a facility card to see its full details, or use the **Book** button to go directly to the booking flow.

---

## Verification

The search was successful if:
- You can see a list of facilities matching your criteria
- Result cards show names, addresses, and availability
- You can tap a card to view the details

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: No search results
**Solution**: Check that:
- The city name is spelled correctly
- The selected date is not too far in the future
- Try removing the facility type filter to see more results

### Problem: The search bar does not respond
**Solution**: Make sure you have an internet connection. Try closing and reopening the app.

articles.title: How to Use the Map View
articles.content:
# How to Use the Map View

**Screen**: Home
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

The map view on the Home screen lets you see sports facilities near you on an interactive map. It is the quickest way to find the nearest facility and book it.

---

## Before You Start

- Make sure the app has access to your location (GPS)
- Check that location is enabled in your phone's settings

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Map View

On the Home screen, find the **Nearby Facilities** section with the map. Tap the map to expand it to full screen.

![Map section](/assets/images/home/map-section.png)

### Step 2: Allow Location Access

The first time you use the map, the app will ask for access to your location. Tap **Allow** to see facilities near you.

![Location permission](/assets/images/home/location-permission.png)

> ⚠️ **Important**: Without location access the map will not be able to show facilities in your area. You can still browse the map manually.

### Step 3: Browse Markers on the Map

On the map you will see coloured markers (pins) indicating sports facilities. Each marker corresponds to one facility.

![Map markers](/assets/images/home/map-markers.png)

- **Zoom in/out** : use the pinch gesture or the +/- buttons
- **Pan** : drag your finger across the map to explore other areas
- **My location** : tap the crosshair icon to return to your position

### Step 4: Tap a Marker

Tap any marker to see basic information about the facility:
- Facility name
- Address
- Distance from you
- Rating

![Marker details](/assets/images/home/map-marker-details.png)

### Step 5: Go to Details or Book

From the marker information pop-up you can:
- **View details** : open the full facility page
- **Book** : go directly to time slot selection

---

## Verification

The map view is working correctly if:
- The map is displayed with your location (blue dot)
- Sports facility markers are visible
- Tapping a marker shows information about the facility

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: The map does not load
**Solution**:
- Check your internet connection
- Close and reopen the app
- Make sure the app is up to date

### Problem: I cannot see any markers
**Solution**:
- Zoom in — markers may not be visible when zoomed far out
- Check whether there are any registered facilities in your area
- Try panning the map to a larger city

### Problem: My location is inaccurate
**Solution**:
- Enable GPS (precise location) in your phone's settings
- Go outside to get a better GPS signal
- Grant the app access to "precise location" in the permissions settings

---

- [How to Search for a Sports Facility](./how-to-search-facilities.md)

articles.title: Troubleshooting : Home Screen
articles.content:
# Troubleshooting : Home Screen

Below you will find solutions to the most common problems with the Home screen in the Spotto app.

---

## Search

### No search results

**Problem**: After entering a city and date, the search bar shows no facilities.

![Empty search results screen](/assets/images/home/ts-no-search-results.png)

**Causes**:
- City name spelled incorrectly
- No Spotto facilities in the selected city
- Filters set too restrictively
- No internet connection

**Solution**:
1. Check the spelling of the city name : use autocomplete suggestions
2. Remove the facility type filter and search again
3. Change the date to today to check general availability
4. Check your internet connection (Wi-Fi/mobile data icon)
5. Close and reopen the app

---

### Search bar does not respond to touch

**Problem**: The search bar does not expand when tapped.

**Causes**:
- The app has frozen
- Device memory issue

**Solution**:
1. Close the app and reopen it
2. Restart your phone
3. Make sure you have the latest version of the app

---

## Map

### Map is not loading

**Problem**: The map section is empty or displays a grey screen.

![Map not loading - grey screen](/assets/images/home/ts-map-not-loading.png)

**Causes**:
- No internet connection
- Issue with Google Maps / Apple Maps services
- Insufficient memory

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Close other apps to free up memory
3. Close and reopen Spotto
4. Update the app to the latest version

---

### I cannot see facility markers on the map

**Problem**: The map loads but there are no pins.

**Causes**:
- The map is zoomed out too far
- There are no Spotto facilities in the visible area
- Data loading issue

**Solution**:
1. Zoom in on the map (pinch with two fingers)
2. Pan the map to the centre of a large city
3. Tap the crosshair button to return to your location
4. Pull the screen down to refresh the data

---

### Location is inaccurate or unavailable

**Problem**: The blue dot (your position) is in the wrong place or does not appear.

**Causes**:
- GPS disabled or inaccurate
- Location permission not granted to Spotto
- Weak GPS signal (indoors)

**Solution**:

**Android**:
1. Settings → Location → Enable
2. Settings → Apps → Spotto → Permissions → Location → "Allow while using the app"
3. Go outside to improve GPS signal

![Android location settings](/assets/images/home/ts-android-location-settings.png)

**iOS**:
1. Settings → Privacy → Location Services → Enable
2. Settings → Privacy → Location Services → Spotto → "While Using"
3. Go outside to improve GPS signal

![iOS location settings](/assets/images/home/ts-ios-location-settings.png)

---

## Booking

### Cannot book a facility : no available time slots

**Problem**: After selecting a facility, all time slots are greyed out (unavailable).

![All time slots greyed out](/assets/images/home/ts-no-available-slots.png)

**Causes**:
- The facility is fully booked on the selected day
- The facility is closed on the selected day
- Calendar synchronisation issue

**Solution**:
1. Change the date to a different day
2. Check the facility's opening hours on the details page
3. Refresh the page (pull down)
4. Look for a similar facility nearby

---

### Payment failed

**Problem**: After confirming the booking, the payment is declined.

![Payment failed error message](/assets/images/home/ts-payment-failed.png)

**Causes**:
- Insufficient funds in the account
- Card expired or blocked
- Issue with the TPay payment system
- Connection timeout

**Solution**:
1. Check your bank account balance
2. Try a different payment method (e.g. BLIK instead of a card)
3. Wait 5 minutes and try again : the booking should appear in the "Pending payments" section
4. If the problem persists, contact customer support

---

### Booking does not appear after payment

**Problem**: I paid, but the booking is not visible in the app.

**Causes**:
- Delay in payment processing
- Session expired during payment
- Payment was not fully processed

**Solution**:
1. Wait 5–15 minutes : processing may take some time
2. Refresh the Home screen (pull down)
3. Check the "Pending payments" section on the Home screen
4. Go to the [Reservations](../reservations/README.md) tab and check there
5. Check your email : a confirmation may have been sent by email
6. If the booking does not appear after 30 minutes, contact support with the transaction number from your bank

---

## Favourites

### Favourites are not being saved

**Problem**: After tapping the heart icon, the facility does not appear in favourites.

**Causes**:
- You are not logged in
- Internet connection issue
- Sync error

**Solution**:
1. Make sure you are logged in to your account
2. Check your internet connection
3. Close and reopen the app
4. Try adding the facility to favourites again

---

### The favourites section is not displayed on the Home screen

**Problem**: I cannot see the "Favourites" section on the main screen.

**Causes**:
- You have no saved favourites
- You are not logged in

**Solution**:
1. The favourites section only appears after at least one facility has been added
2. Log in to your account
3. Add a facility to favourites ([how to do it](./how-to-manage-favorites.md))

---

## General issues

### Home screen is blank or not loading

**Problem**: After opening the app, the Home screen is white or shows an error.

![Blank Home screen](/assets/images/home/ts-blank-home-screen.png)

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Close and reopen the app
3. Clear the app cache:
   - **Android**: Settings → Apps → Spotto → Storage → Clear cache
   - **iOS**: Delete and reinstall the app
4. Update the app to the latest version

---

### Data on the Home screen is out of date

**Problem**: Reservations or favourites do not reflect the current state.

**Solution**:
1. Pull the screen down to refresh the data
2. Check your internet connection
3. Close and reopen the app

---

## Still need help?

If the above solutions did not help:
- Check the [Home screen FAQ](./faq.md)

articles.title: FAQ: Profile Screen
articles.content:
# Frequently Asked Questions: Profile Screen and Settings

## Account

### How can I change my data?

Open the Profile screen and tap **Edit**. You can change your first name, last name, phone number, date of birth, and interests. [Guide](./how-to-edit-profile.md)

### How do I change my password?

Currently, password changes are done through the "Forgot Password" feature on the login screen. More: [Login issues](../troubleshooting/authentication/login-failed.md)

### Can I delete my account?

The account deletion feature is under development. If needed, contact support@spotto.pl.

---

## Avatar

### How do I change my profile picture?

Tap your avatar on the Profile screen. A window with available avatars will appear for you to choose from. [Guide](./how-to-change-avatar.md)

### Can I upload my own photo?

Currently, only predefined animal avatars are available. You can set custom photos in [Business](../business/how-to-create-profile.md) and [Trainer](../trainer/how-to-create-trainer-profile.md) profiles.

---

## Roles

### What are roles in Spotto?

Roles (profile types) determine which features you have access to:
- **User**: reservations, Shop (always active)
- **Business**: company management
- **Trainer**: conducting classes

[Details](./how-to-manage-roles.md)

### How do I enable the Business or Trainer role?

Open the "Profile types" section on the Profile screen and toggle the switch next to your desired role. When enabling a role for the first time, you must accept the terms and conditions.

### Can I have multiple roles at the same time?

Yes: you can be a User, business owner, and trainer simultaneously.

---

## Privacy

### What data does Spotto collect?

Spotto collects personal data (name, email, phone), reservation history, and optionally location data. Details can be found in the [Privacy Policy](./features/privacy-settings.md).

### How do I disable location tracking?

Go to Settings > Privacy > Privacy settings and turn off the "Location tracking" toggle. [Guide](./how-to-manage-privacy.md)

### How do I reset analytics data?

In privacy settings, tap **Reset analytics** and confirm. This operation is irreversible.

### How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?

Go to Settings > Privacy > Privacy settings and turn off "Marketing emails".

---

## Settings

### How do I change the language?

Go to Settings > Preferences > Language. Choose Polish or English. [Guide](./how-to-change-language.md)

### How do I log out of the app?

In Settings, scroll to the bottom and tap **Log out**. Confirm the logout.

### How do I contact support?

In Settings, open the "Help and support" section. Contact details:
- **Support**: support@spotto.pl
- **Complaints**: reklamacje@spotto.pl

---

## Related Topics

- [Troubleshooting login issues](../troubleshooting/authentication/login-failed.md)
- [Business Screen](../business/README.md)
- [Trainer Screen](../trainer/README.md)

articles.content:
# Privacy Settings

## Description

Privacy settings allow you to control what data the Spotto app collects and how it is used. All settings can be changed independently.

## Available Settings

| Setting | Description | Default |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| **Analytics** | Collection of usage data to improve the app | Enabled |
| **Crash reports** | Automatic sending of error reports | Enabled |
| **Location tracking** | Location data for nearby facility recommendations | Disabled |
| **Data sharing** | Anonymous data shared with partners | Disabled |
| **Marketing emails** | Information about promotions and updates | Disabled |
| **Push notifications** | Notifications about reservations and updates | Enabled |

## Resetting Analytics

The **Reset analytics** option deletes all collected analytics data. This operation is irreversible.

## Privacy Policy (GDPR)

The Spotto app processes personal data in accordance with GDPR. The full privacy policy is available in Settings > Privacy and security > Privacy policy.

### Collected Data

- Personal data (first name, last name, email, phone)
- Company data (NIP: for business roles)
- Reservation history
- Location data (with consent)

### Processing Purposes

- Maintaining the user account
- Processing reservations
- Handling complaints
- Marketing (with consent)
- Tax obligations

### Retention Period

- Tax data: 5 years
- Other data: until account deletion

### Your Rights

- Access to data
- Data correction
- Data deletion
- Data portability
- Objection to processing

---

## Related

- [How to manage privacy: guide](../how-to-manage-privacy.md)

articles.title: Role Management
articles.content:
# Role Management

## Description

The role system in Spotto allows you to activate different app features depending on who you are: a user, a business owner, or a trainer. Each role unlocks a separate tab and set of features. You can have all three roles active simultaneously.

## Available Roles

### User

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Status** | Always active: cannot be disabled |
| **Terms** | Must be accepted during registration |
| **Tabs** | Home, Reservations, Shop, Profile |

**User role features:**
- Searching and browsing sports facilities
- Booking facilities (courts, halls, shooting ranges)
- Managing favorite facilities
- Browsing and purchasing products in the Shop (passes, packages)
- Participating in trainings conducted by trainers
- Viewing reservation and purchase history

### Business (Business Owner)

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Status** | Optional: can be enabled/disabled |
| **Terms** | Required when activating the role |
| **Tab** | [Business](../../business/README.md) |

**Business role features:**
- Creating and managing a company profile
- Adding and configuring sports facilities
- Managing schedules and pricing
- Configuring online payments (TPay)
- Managing agents and trainers
- Creating products (passes, packages)
- Generating monthly reports
- KSeF integration (e-invoices)

### Trainer

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Status** | Optional: can be enabled/disabled |
| **Terms** | Required when activating the role |
| **Tab** | [Trainer](../../trainer/README.md) |

**Trainer role features:**
- Creating a trainer profile with description and specializations
- Establishing collaborations with sports businesses
- Creating and managing trainings
- Managing class participants
- Configuring availability schedule
- Setting hourly rates

## Switching Roles

To enable or disable a role:

1. Go to **Profile** > **Settings**
2. Find the **Roles** section
3. Toggle the switch next to the desired role
4. When enabling for the first time: accept the terms and conditions

![Role management: Screenshot #61](../../../assets/images/profile/role-management-detail.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: Disabling a role does not cause data loss. If you disable the Business role, your company and facilities remain in the system: after re-enabling, everything will come back.

## Terms and Conditions

Each role has separate terms and conditions that you must accept:

| Terms | When required | Can be declined? |
|-------|---------------|------------------|
| **User Terms** | During account registration | No: required to use the app |
| **Business Terms** | When enabling the Business role | Yes: the role will not be activated |
| **Trainer Terms** | When enabling the Trainer role | Yes: the role will not be activated |

Terms can be expanded and read directly in the app before acceptance. The content of terms may change: the app will notify you when a new version requires re-acceptance.

## What Happens When a Role Is Disabled

| Role | Effect of disabling |
|------|---------------------|
| **Business** | The Business tab disappears from navigation. The company, facilities, and products remain in the system, but you cannot manage them until re-enabling |
| **Trainer** | The Trainer tab disappears from navigation. The trainer profile and business associations remain, but you cannot create new trainings |

> ⚠️ **Important**: The User role is an integral part of the account and cannot be disabled.

---

## Related

- [How to manage roles: guide](../how-to-manage-roles.md)
- [Account settings](./account-settings.md)
- [Business Screen](../../business/README.md)
- [Trainer Screen](../../trainer/README.md)

# Frequently Asked Questions : Reservations Screen

## Viewing Reservations

### How do I check my upcoming reservations?
Tap the calendar icon on the bottom navigation bar. You will see a list of upcoming reservations and trainings sorted by date. [Full guide](./how-to-view-bookings.md)

### Can I also see trainings I signed up for?
Yes. The Reservations screen displays both facility reservations and trainer-led trainings. Each type has a separate color-coded badge.

### Why doesn't my new reservation appear on the list?
The app synchronizes new reservations automatically (up to 5 attempts). Wait a few seconds: the new reservation will appear with a blue border and a pulsing animation.

---

## Cancellation

### When can I cancel a reservation?
You can cancel a reservation if there are more than 48 hours until it starts. [Full rules](./features/refund-policy.md)

### How much does cancellation cost?
The cancellation fee is 5% of the canceled portion's value. You will receive a 95% refund to your account.

### Can I cancel just one hour from a multi-hour reservation?
Yes: use the [partial cancellation](./how-to-partial-cancel.md) feature. Select specific slots to cancel, and the rest will remain active.

![IMG_RES_021 : Slot selection view for partial cancellation](/assets/images/reservations/faq-partial-cancel-slots.png)

### Can I cancel a reservation paid with a pass?
No. Reservations paid with a pass or voucher cannot be canceled through the app. Contact the facility directly.

### What happens if the facility cancels my reservation?
You will receive a full 100% refund (no 5% fee). A notification will appear in the app.

---

## Payments and Refunds

### How long does a refund take?
The refund reaches your account within **3-5 business days** from the moment of cancellation.

### Which account does the refund go to?
The refund goes to the same payment method used for the reservation (card, bank account).

### What are "Pending Payments"?
These are reservations for which payment was not completed. They appear at the top of the Reservations screen. You can complete the payment or cancel the reservation. [How to complete](./how-to-pay-pending.md)

![IMG_RES_020 : Pending payments section on the Reservations screen](/assets/images/reservations/faq-pending-payments.png)

### What payment methods are available?
Spotto supports payments through TPay: payment cards (Visa, Mastercard), fast bank transfers, and BLIK.

---

## Statuses

### What do the status colors mean?

![IMG_RES_019 : Color-coded reservation status badges](/assets/images/reservations/faq-status-badges.png)

- 🟢 **Green** : Confirmed (paid, ready)
- 🟡 **Yellow** : Pending / Partial
- 🔵 **Blue** : Active (in progress now)
- 🔴 **Red** : Canceled
- ⚪ **Gray** : Completed

[Full list of statuses](./features/booking-status.md)

### What does the "Partial" status mean?
It means that some hours from the reservation have been canceled, but the remaining slots are still active.

---

## Related Topics

- [Reservations Screen : overview](./README.md)
- [Troubleshooting](./troubleshooting.md)

---

articles.title: Reservation Statuses
articles.content:
# Reservation Statuses

## Description

Every reservation in Spotto has an assigned status that indicates its current state. The status is displayed as a color-coded badge on the reservation card and in the details view.

## Status List

![IMG_RES_027 : Color-coded status badges on reservation cards](/assets/images/reservations/feat-status-badges-list.png)

| Status | Color | Meaning | Can be canceled? |
|--------|-------|---------|------------------|
| **Confirmed** | 🟢 Green | Reservation paid and ready | Yes |
| **Pending** | 🟡 Yellow | Awaiting payment or confirmation | Yes |
| **Active** | 🔵 Blue | Reservation is in progress right now | Yes* |
| **Partial** | 🟡 Yellow | Some slots have been canceled | Yes |
| **Partial refund** | 🟡 Yellow | Refund for canceled slots processed | Yes |
| **Completed** | ⚪ Gray | Reservation fulfilled: visit completed | No |
| **Canceled** | 🔴 Red | Reservation fully canceled | No |

*An active reservation can only be canceled if it meets the 48h rule.

## Reservation Lifecycle

![IMG_RES_028 : Reservation lifecycle diagram](/assets/images/reservations/feat-status-lifecycle.png)

```
Created -> Pending -> Confirmed -> Active -> Completed
              ↓           ↓          ↓
          Canceled      Partial    Canceled
                          ↓
                    Partial refund
```

## Where You See the Status

- **Reservation list** : color-coded badge on the card
- **Reservation details** : in the "Reservation information" section
- **Pending payments** : separate section for "Pending" status

## What to Do Based on Status

| Status | Recommended Action |
|--------|-------------------|
| Pending | [Complete the payment](../how-to-pay-pending.md) |
| Confirmed | Prepare for your visit |
| Partial | Check which hours are still active |
| Canceled | You can make a new reservation |

## Related

- [How to view reservations](../how-to-view-bookings.md)
- [Reservation details](./reservation-details.md)
- [Refund policy](./refund-policy.md)

articles.title: Partial Cancellation
articles.content:
# Partial Cancellation

## Description

Partial cancellation allows you to cancel selected time slots from a multi-hour reservation while keeping the rest. This is useful when your plans change but you still want to use part of the booked time.

## When It Is Available

Partial cancellation is available when:
- The reservation has **more than one time slot**
- The reservation meets the [cancellation rules](./refund-policy.md) (48h, future date)
- Not all slots except one have already been canceled

## How It Works

### Slot View

After opening partial cancellation, you will see a list of all slots:

![IMG_RES_029 : Slot list with cancellation selection](/assets/images/reservations/feat-partial-cancel-slot-list.png)

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Hour** | Slot start time (e.g., "10:00") |
| **Price** | Cost of that specific slot (total price / number of slots) |
| **Status** | "Active" (can be canceled) or "Canceled" (gray, unavailable) |
| **Selection** | Blue border + checkmark icon for selected slots |

### Limitations

- **You cannot cancel all slots** : use full cancellation for that
- **Canceled slots cannot be restored** : the decision is irreversible
- **At least 1 active slot must remain**

### System Response

After cancellation, you will receive a detailed summary:

![IMG_RES_030 : Partial cancellation summary with amounts](/assets/images/reservations/feat-partial-cancel-summary.png)

| Field | Example |
|-------|---------|
| Canceled slots | 2 |
| Original price | 200 PLN |
| Remaining price | 100 PLN |
| Refund amount | 95 PLN |
| Fee (5%) | 5 PLN |
| New status | "Partial" |

## Reservation Status After Partial Cancellation

- Status changes to **"Partial"** (partial)
- In the reservation details, canceled slots are **shown with strikethrough**

![IMG_RES_031 : Strikethrough slots in reservation details view](/assets/images/reservations/feat-partial-cancel-crossed-slots.png)
- The price displays as the remaining amount

## Related

- [How to partially cancel : guide](../how-to-partial-cancel.md)
- [How to cancel an entire reservation](../how-to-cancel-booking.md)
- [Refund policy](./refund-policy.md)

---

articles.title: Cancellation and Refund Policy
articles.content:
# Cancellation and Refund Policy

## Description

Spotto allows reservation cancellation with a refund, provided certain rules are met. Below you will find complete information about the cancellation policy.

## Cancellation Rules

### 48-Hour Rule

A reservation can be canceled **no later than 48 hours** before the scheduled visit date.

| Time until reservation | Can it be canceled? |
|------------------------|---------------------|
| > 48 hours | Yes |
| 24-48 hours | No |
| < 24 hours | No |
| Today | No |
| Past | No |

### Who Can Cancel

- Only the person who made the reservation can cancel it
- Reservations paid with a **pass or voucher** cannot be canceled
- Cancellation applies to reservations with status: Confirmed, Pending, Active, Partial

## Cancellation Fee

A fee is charged for each cancellation (full or partial):

| Element | Value |
|---------|-------|
| **Fee** | 5% of the canceled portion's value |
| **Refund** | 95% of the canceled portion's value |

**Example**: Canceling a 200 PLN reservation
- Fee: 10 PLN (5%)
- Refund: 190 PLN (95%)

![IMG_RES_034 : Cancellation confirmation screen with refund amount](/assets/images/reservations/feat-refund-calculation.png)

## Refund Timeline

- The refund is processed automatically through the TPay system
- Funds return to your account within **3-5 business days**
- The refund goes to the same payment method used for the reservation

## Partial Cancellation

For partial cancellation:
- The 5% fee is charged **only on the canceled slots**
- Remaining slots stay active
- Reservation status changes to "Partial"

**Example**: Reservation of 4 slots at 50 PLN each (200 PLN total), canceling 2 slots:
- Canceled value: 100 PLN
- Fee: 5 PLN (5% of 100 PLN)
- Refund: 95 PLN
- Remaining active value: 100 PLN

## Policy Exceptions

| Situation | Rule |
|-----------|------|
| Pass/voucher | Cancellation not available |
| Facility canceled the reservation | Full 100% refund |
| Technical failure | Contact support |

## Related

- [How to cancel a reservation](../how-to-cancel-booking.md)
- [How to partially cancel](../how-to-partial-cancel.md)
- [Reservation statuses](./booking-status.md)

---

articles.content:
# Reservation Details

## Description

The reservation details view is a full-screen modal that opens after tapping a reservation card. It contains complete information about your reservation.

## View Sections

### Facility Information

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Photo** | Facility avatar or photo |
| **Facility name** | Official name |
| **Location** | Full address with city |
| **Contact** | Phone number and email with quick contact buttons |

![IMG_RES_017 : Facility information section](/assets/images/reservations/details-facility-info.png)

### Reservation Details

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Date** | Full date in local format (e.g., "Friday, March 28, 2026") |
| **Hours** | List of booked slots (e.g., "10:00 - 11:00 ; 11:00 - 12:00") |
| **Duration** | Total number of hours |
| **Price** | Total reservation cost |
| **Number of people** | Visible for group reservations |

### Time Slots

Each booked slot is displayed as a separate chip:
- **Active** : normal appearance with time
- **Canceled** : strikethrough text, gray color

![IMG_RES_018 : Time slots in details](/assets/images/reservations/details-time-slots.png)

### Trainer Information (optional)

If a trainer is assigned to the reservation:
- Trainer avatar
- First and last name
- Role ("Professional trainer")
- Trainer service price
- Contact (phone, email)

![IMG_RES_032 : Trainer information section in details](/assets/images/reservations/details-trainer-info.png)

### Payment Information

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Payment status** | "Paid" (green) or "Awaiting payment" (yellow) |
| **Reservation number** | First 7 characters of the ID |
| **Creation date** | When the reservation was made |

### Action Buttons

Depending on the reservation state, you will see:
- **Pay Now** : if the reservation is unpaid
- **Cancel Partially** : if the reservation has multiple slots
- **Cancel All** : if the reservation qualifies for cancellation

![IMG_RES_033 : Action buttons in reservation details](/assets/images/reservations/details-action-buttons.png)

- [How to view reservations](../how-to-view-bookings.md)
- [Reservation statuses](./booking-status.md)

articles.title: How to cancel a reservation
articles.content:
# How to cancel a reservation

**Screen**: Reservations
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

If your plans change, you can cancel an entire reservation and receive a refund. Cancellation is available for reservations with a future date, subject to the 48-hour rule.

---

## Before You Start

- The reservation must have a **future date** (not today and not in the past)
- There must be **more than 48 hours** until the reservation starts
- The reservation must not be paid with a voucher/pass
- Reservation status must be: confirmed, pending, active, or partially canceled

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open reservation details

On the Reservations screen, tap the card of the reservation you want to cancel.

![IMG_RES_006 : Tap the reservation card](/assets/images/reservations/tap-reservation-card.png)

### Step 2: Tap "Cancel All"

In the details view, scroll down to the actions section. Tap the **Cancel All** button.

![IMG_RES_007 : Cancel All button](/assets/images/reservations/cancel-all-button.png)

> ⚠️ **Important**: If the button is inactive (gray), it means the reservation does not qualify for cancellation: check the conditions in the "Before You Start" section.

### Step 3: Confirm cancellation

A confirmation dialog will appear asking if you are sure you want to cancel. Tap **Confirm Cancellation**.

![IMG_RES_008 : Cancellation confirmation dialog](/assets/images/reservations/cancel-confirmation.png)

### Step 4: Wait for processing

The app will process the cancellation: you will see a loading indicator. Once complete:

- A **cancellation confirmation** will appear with refund details
- Refund amount = 95% of the price (5% cancellation fee)
- The refund will reach your account within 3-5 business days

![IMG_RES_009 : Cancellation confirmation with refund](/assets/images/reservations/cancel-success.png)

---

## Cancellation Rules

| Rule | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Deadline** | Min. 48 hours before start |
| **Fee** | 5% of reservation value |
| **Refund** | 95% to your account in 3-5 business days |
| **Passes** | Reservations paid with pass/voucher cannot be canceled |
| **Today/past** | Reservations for today and past ones cannot be canceled |

> 💡 **Tip**: If you want to cancel only some hours, use the [partial cancellation](./how-to-partial-cancel.md) feature.

---

## Verification

Cancellation was successful if:
- You see a confirmation with the refund amount
- Reservation status changed to "Canceled"
- The reservation disappeared from the upcoming list

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: Cancel button is inactive
**Solution**: Check whether:
- More than 48 hours remain until the reservation
- The reservation was not paid with a pass
- The reservation is not already canceled

### Problem: Error "Cannot cancel within 48 hours"
**Solution**: The 48h rule is mandatory. If less than 48 hours remain until your reservation, cancellation is not possible. Contact the facility directly.

### Problem: Refund has not arrived after 5 business days
**Solution**: Refunds are processed through the TPay system. If funds have not arrived after 5 days:
1. Check your bank transaction history
2. Contact Spotto support, providing the reservation number

---

## Related Topics

- [How to partially cancel](./how-to-partial-cancel.md)
- [Cancellation and refund policy](./features/refund-policy.md)
- [Reservation statuses](./features/booking-status.md)

---

articles.title: How to partially cancel a reservation
articles.content:
# How to partially cancel a reservation

**Screen**: Reservations
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Medium

## Overview

If you booked a facility for several hours but want to give up some of them, you can cancel selected time slots while keeping the rest of the reservation. You will receive a refund proportional to the canceled hours.

---

## Before You Start

- The reservation must have **more than one time slot**
- You cannot cancel **all** slots (use full cancellation for that)
- The same rules as full cancellation apply (48h, future date)

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open reservation details

On the Reservations screen, tap the card of the reservation you want to partially cancel.

### Step 2: Tap "Cancel Partially"

In the details view, tap the **Cancel Partially** button. The button is only visible for reservations with multiple slots.

![IMG_RES_010 : Partial cancellation button](/assets/images/reservations/partial-cancel-button.png)

### Step 3: Select slots to cancel

A screen will open with a list of all booked hours. Each slot shows:

- **Hour** : e.g., "10:00"
- **Price** : cost of that slot
- **Status** : "Active" or "Canceled" (if previously canceled)

Tap the slots you want to cancel. Selected slots will be highlighted with a blue border and a checkmark icon.

![IMG_RES_011 : Selecting slots to cancel](/assets/images/reservations/select-slots.png)

> ⚠️ **Important**: Already canceled slots (gray) cannot be selected again. You must leave at least one active slot.

### Step 4: Review the summary

At the bottom of the screen you will see:
- Number of selected slots
- Total price of canceled slots

Tap **Cancel Selected**.

### Step 5: Confirm in the confirmation dialog

An overlay will appear with a confirmation containing:
- Number of slots to cancel
- **Estimated refund** (95% of value: after deducting the 5% fee)

![IMG_RES_012 : Partial cancellation confirmation](/assets/images/reservations/partial-cancel-confirm.png)

Tap **Confirm** to cancel the selected slots.

### Step 6: View the summary

After processing, you will see a summary:

| Information | Example |
|-------------|---------|
| Canceled slots | 2 of 4 |
| Original price | 200 PLN |
| Remaining price | 100 PLN |
| Refund amount | 95 PLN |
| Cancellation fee | 5% (5 PLN) |

![IMG_RES_013 : Partial cancellation summary](/assets/images/reservations/partial-cancel-summary.png)

> 💡 The dialog will close automatically after 3 seconds.

---

## Verification

Partial cancellation was successful if:
- You see a summary with the refund amount
- Reservation status changed to "Partial"
- Canceled slots are shown with strikethrough in the details

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: I don't see the "Cancel Partially" button
**Solution**: The button appears only when the reservation has more than one time slot. If you have a one-hour reservation, use [full cancellation](./how-to-cancel-booking.md).

### Problem: I can't select a slot
**Solution**: The slot is probably already canceled (gray color). You can only cancel active slots.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to cancel a reservation (full)](./how-to-cancel-booking.md)
- [Cancellation and refund policy](./features/refund-policy.md)
- [Partial cancellation : details](./features/partial-cancellation.md)

---

articles.title: How to complete a pending payment
articles.content:
# How to complete a pending payment

**Screen**: Reservations
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

If you did not complete the payment for a reservation, it will appear in the **Pending Payments** section on the Reservations screen. You can complete the transaction or cancel it.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Find the pending payments section

At the top of the Reservations screen, you will see a section with an alert icon and the heading **Pending Payments**.

![IMG_RES_014 : Pending payments section](/assets/images/reservations/pending-payments-section.png)

> 💡 The section is displayed only when you have unfinished transactions. If you don't see it: you have no pending payments.

### Step 2: Check payment details

Each pending payment card contains:
- **Description** : facility or training name
- **Amount** : price to pay
- **Time** : when it was created (e.g., "5 minutes ago")
- **Status** : "Awaiting payment"

### Step 3: Tap "Payment"

Tap the blue **Payment** button on the card.

![IMG_RES_015 : Payment button](/assets/images/reservations/pay-button.png)

### Step 4: Complete payment in TPay

A browser will open with the TPay payment system. Choose a payment method:
- **Payment card** (Visa, Mastercard)
- **Fast bank transfer**
- **BLIK**

Complete the transaction following the instructions on the TPay page.

### Step 5: Return to the app

After completing the payment, return to the Spotto app. The app will automatically check the payment status.

- **Success** : you will see a green confirmation, the reservation will be confirmed
- **Timeout** : yellow warning, try again in a moment
- **Error** : red message, try a different payment method

![IMG_RES_016 : Payment confirmation](/assets/images/reservations/payment-success.png)

---

## Canceling a Pending Payment

If you don't want to continue with the reservation:

1. Tap the gray **Cancel** button on the payment card
2. In the confirmation dialog, tap **Cancel Payment**
3. The reservation will be canceled and the card will disappear from the list

---

## Important Information

- Pending payments have a **limited validity period**
- If you don't pay within the designated time, the reservation will be automatically canceled
- The app checks the payment status automatically (up to 30 attempts every 2 seconds)

---

## Verification

Payment was successful if:
- You see a green confirmation
- The card disappeared from the pending payments section
- The reservation appears on the upcoming list with "Confirmed" status

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: Payment won't go through
**Solution**: Check your bank account balance, card validity, and try a different method (e.g., BLIK instead of card).

### Problem: After payment I still see "Pending"
**Solution**: Wait a minute and refresh the screen. If the problem persists, check your bank transaction history: if funds were deducted, contact support.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to view reservations](./how-to-view-bookings.md)
- [Reservation statuses](./features/booking-status.md)
- [Payment troubleshooting](./troubleshooting.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-28

articles.title: How to view reservations
articles.content:
# How to view reservations

**Screen**: Reservations
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

The Reservations screen shows all your upcoming sports facility reservations and trainings, sorted from the nearest. You can quickly check the details of each visit.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Reservations screen

Tap the **calendar** icon on the bottom navigation bar of the app.

![IMG_RES_002 : Navigation bar with Reservations button highlighted](/assets/images/reservations/nav-bar-reservations.png)

### Step 2: Browse upcoming events

On the screen you will see a list of upcoming events. Each card contains:

- **Photo** : facility avatar or trainer icon
- **Title** : facility or training name
- **Date and time** : formatted as "Today", "Tomorrow", or full date
- **Location** : facility address
- **Duration** : number of booked hours
- **Price** : total cost
- **Type** : "Reservation" or "Training" badge

![IMG_RES_003 : Upcoming reservations list](/assets/images/reservations/upcoming-list.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: A newly created reservation will appear with a blue border and a pulsing animation so you can easily find it.

### Step 3: See all reservations

If you have more reservations than visible on the screen, tap the **See all** button at the top of the section.

![IMG_RES_004 : See all button](/assets/images/reservations/see-all-button.png)

A full-screen list with all upcoming events will open.

### Step 4: Open reservation details

Tap any card to see full details:

- Facility information (name, address, contact)
- Booked hours (time slots)
- Trainer information (if hired)
- Price breakdown
- Payment status
- Reservation number
- Action buttons (payment, cancellation)

![IMG_RES_005 : Reservation details view](/assets/images/reservations/reservation-details.png)

---

## Event Types

On the list you will see two types of events:

| Type | Badge | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| **Reservation** | Blue | Booked sports facility (court, hall, shooting range) |
| **Training** | Green | Trainer-led training you signed up for |

---

## Verification

Browsing works correctly if:
- You can see a list of your upcoming reservations
- Cards contain dates, names, and prices
- You can tap a card to see details

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: The list is empty
**Solution**: If you have no upcoming reservations, you will see a message encouraging you to make your first reservation. Go to the [Home screen](../home/README.md) to book a facility.

### Problem: New reservation doesn't appear
**Solution**: Wait a few seconds: the app synchronizes new reservations with the service (up to 5 attempts). If it still doesn't show, pull the screen down to refresh.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to cancel a reservation](./how-to-cancel-booking.md)
- [How to complete a payment](./how-to-pay-pending.md)
- [Reservation statuses](./features/booking-status.md)
- [Reservation details](./features/reservation-details.md)

---

articles.content:
# Troubleshooting : Reservations Screen

Below you will find solutions to the most common issues related to reservations in the Spotto app.

---

## Viewing Reservations

### Reservation does not appear after payment

**Problem**: I paid, but the reservation is not showing on the list.

**Causes**:
- Synchronization delay (the app retries up to 5 times)
- Payment is still being processed
- Session expired during payment

**Solution**:
1. Wait 10-15 seconds: the app automatically synchronizes new reservations
2. Pull the screen down to refresh
3. Check the "Pending Payments" section: the reservation may be waiting for payment completion
4. Close and reopen the app
5. If it does not appear after 15 minutes, contact support with the transaction number

---

### Reservation list is empty

**Problem**: I don't see any reservations, even though I have them.

![IMG_RES_026 : Empty reservation list](/assets/images/reservations/ts-empty-list.png)

**Causes**:
- No internet connection
- All reservations are in the past (only upcoming ones are displayed)
- User session issue

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Remember that the screen only shows **upcoming** reservations
3. Log out and log back in
4. Update the app to the latest version

---

## Cancellation

### Cannot cancel a reservation

**Problem**: The cancel button is inactive or an error appears.

![IMG_RES_022 : Inactive cancel button](/assets/images/reservations/ts-cancel-button-disabled.png)

**Causes**:
- Less than 48 hours remain until the reservation
- The reservation is for today or in the past
- Reservation was paid with a pass/voucher
- Reservation is already canceled

**Solution**:
1. Check the reservation date: it must be > 48h in the future
2. Reservations paid with a pass cannot be canceled: contact the facility
3. If you see an error "Cannot cancel", read the message: it contains the reason for rejection

---

### "48-hour rule" error

**Problem**: A message appears saying cancellation is not possible due to the 48-hour rule.

![IMG_RES_023 : 48-hour rule error message](/assets/images/reservations/ts-48h-rule-error.png)

**Solution**: The rule is mandatory and cannot be bypassed. Options:
1. Contact the facility directly (phone or email from the details view)
2. Ask the facility to cancel on their end
3. In case of serious circumstances, contact Spotto support

---

### Partial cancellation is not working

**Problem**: I don't see the partial cancellation option.

**Causes**:
- The reservation has only 1 time slot
- All slots except one have already been canceled

**Solution**: Partial cancellation requires a minimum of 2 active slots. For single-hour reservations, use full cancellation.

---

## Payments

### Payment failed

**Problem**: Payment attempt ends with an error.

![IMG_RES_024 : Payment error message](/assets/images/reservations/ts-payment-failed.png)

**Causes**:
- Insufficient funds
- Expired card
- TPay system issue
- Connection timeout

**Solution**:
1. Check your bank account balance
2. Try a different payment method (card -> BLIK -> bank transfer)
3. Wait 5 minutes and try again
4. The reservation should still be in the "Pending Payments" section

---

### Refund has not arrived

**Problem**: I canceled a reservation but have not received the refund.

**Causes**:
- The refund is being processed (3-5 business days)
- Bank-side issue
- Card refunds may take longer than bank transfers

**Solution**:
1. Wait the full 5 business days from the moment of cancellation
2. Check your bank transaction history (the refund may appear under a different name)
3. If there is no refund after 7 days: contact Spotto support, providing:
   - Reservation number (visible in details)
   - Cancellation date
   - Expected refund amount

---

### Pending payment expired

**Problem**: The reservation disappeared from pending, but I did not pay.

**Solution**: Pending payments have a limited validity period. Once it expires, the reservation is automatically canceled. Make a new reservation on the [Home screen](../home/how-to-book-facility.md).

---

## General

### Reservations screen won't load

**Problem**: The screen is blank or displays an error.

![IMG_RES_025 : Blank Reservations screen with error](/assets/images/reservations/ts-blank-screen.png)

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Close and reopen the app
3. Clear the cache:
   - **Android**: Settings -> Apps -> Spotto -> Storage -> Clear cache
   - **iOS**: Delete and reinstall the app
4. Update to the latest version

---

## Still need help?

If the above solutions did not help:
- Check the [Reservations Screen FAQ](./faq.md)
- Contact the Spotto support team

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-28

articles.content:
# Shop Screen

**Shop in the Spotto app**: buy passes, packages, and subscriptions for sports facilities.

## Screen Overview

The Shop screen allows you to browse and purchase products offered by sports facilities: passes, entry packages, and subscriptions. After purchase, products appear in the "My Purchases" tab, where you can use them.

![Shop screen overview: Screenshot #1](/assets/images/shop/shop-screen-overview.png)

### What you'll find on the Shop screen

| Section | Description | More |
|---------|-------------|------|
| "Shop" tab | Browse and buy products | [Details](./features/product-catalog.md) |
| "My Purchases" tab | Your purchased products and their status | [Details](./features/my-purchases.md) |
| Product search | Search by name, business, or city | [Details](./features/search-filters.md) |
| Filters and sorting | Narrow results by price, period, business | [Details](./features/search-filters.md) |
| Payment system | Secure payments via TPay | [Details](./features/payments.md) |

---

## Step-by-Step Guides

### Purchasing

- [How to buy a product (pass/package)](./how-to-buy-pass.md): find a product, buy it, and pay via TPay
- [How to use a purchased product](./how-to-use-product.md): show the verification code to facility staff
- [How to share a product with a friend](./how-to-share-product.md): send a product link

### Managing Purchases

- [How to view my purchases](./how-to-view-purchases.md): check status, remaining entries, and validity
- [How to filter and search products](./how-to-filter-products.md): search by price, city, validity period

---

## Detailed Feature Descriptions

- [Product Catalog](./features/product-catalog.md): product types, product cards
- [My Purchases](./features/my-purchases.md): statuses, usage progress
- [Search and Filters](./features/search-filters.md): filtering, sorting results
- [Payments](./features/payments.md): TPay, payment methods, confirmations

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

See [Shop Screen FAQ](./faq.md): answers to questions about products, payments, usage, and validity.

---

## Troubleshooting

Having trouble with a purchase or product? See [Troubleshooting](./troubleshooting.md):

- Payment failed
- Product doesn't appear in "My Purchases"
- Verification code doesn't work
- Product expired prematurely

---

## Related Topics

- [How to book a sports facility](../home/how-to-book-facility.md)
- [Troubleshooting payment issues](../troubleshooting/payments/payment-failed.md)
- [Managing products (for businesses)](../business/how-to-manage-products.md)

---

articles.title: FAQ: Shop Screen
articles.content:
# Frequently Asked Questions: Shop Screen

## Purchasing

### What is a product in the Spotto Shop?

A product is a pass, entry package, or subscription offered by a sports facility. When you buy a product, you receive a specific number of entries that you can use within a given time period.

### What types of products are available?

Products vary by validity period:
- **Daily/weekly**: short-term packages
- **Monthly**: the most popular passes
- **Annual**: long-term subscriptions
- **Lifetime**: unlimited-duration passes

### Can I buy a product for someone else?

No: products are linked to your account. However, you can [share a product link](./how-to-share-product.md) so another person can buy it for themselves.

---

## Payments

### What payment methods are available?

Payments are handled by the TPay system. Available methods include:
- Credit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard)
- Instant bank transfer
- BLIK

### Is my payment information secure?

Yes. Payments are processed by the certified TPay gateway. Spotto does not store your card details: all data goes directly to TPay.

### What happens if the payment fails?

The purchase will not be completed, and your account will not be charged. You can try again or choose a different payment method. [Troubleshooting payment issues](../troubleshooting/payments/payment-failed.md)

### Can I get an invoice?

Invoicing depends on the sports facility. Contact the business directly: you can find their contact details in the purchase details under "My Purchases".

---

## Using Products

### How do I use a purchased product?

Open "My Purchases", find the active product, and tap "Use Product". Show the displayed verification code to the facility staff. [Detailed guide](./how-to-use-product.md)

### How many entries do I have left?

On the purchase card in "My Purchases", you'll see a progress bar and counter (e.g., "7 of 10 entries remaining").

### Can I use a product at different locations of the same business?

It depends on the product:
- Products marked as "All facilities": yes, at all business locations
- Products assigned to specific facilities: only at selected locations

---

## Product Validity

### What happens when a product expires?

The product status changes to "Expired" (yellow label). Unused entries are forfeited. There is no option to extend the product: you need to buy a new one.

### Can I return a product?

Return policies are set by individual sports facilities. Contact the business directly to learn about return options.

### When does the validity period start?

The validity period starts from the purchase date. For example: if you buy a monthly pass on March 15, it will be valid until April 15.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to buy a product](./how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [How to use a product](./how-to-use-product.md)
- [Troubleshooting: Shop](./troubleshooting.md)

articles.title: My Purchases
articles.content:
# My Purchases

## Description

The "My Purchases" tab on the Shop screen contains a list of all products you've bought. Each purchase has its own status, usage counter, and expiration date.

## Purchase Card

Each purchased product is displayed as a card with the following information:

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Title and subtitle** | Name of the purchased product |
| **Status** | Active, Expired, or Used Up (with colored label) |
| **Progress bar** | Visual representation of remaining entries vs. total |
| **Purchase date** | When you bought the product |
| **Expiration date** | Until when the product is active |
| **Business** | Sports facility offering the product |
| **"Use Product" button** | Generates a verification code (active products only) |

## Purchase Statuses

| Status | Color | Meaning |
|--------|-------|---------|
| **Active** | Green (#10B981) | Product is valid, you can use it |
| **Expired** | Yellow (#F59E0B) | Validity period has passed |
| **Used Up** (Depleted) | Red (#EF4444) | All entries have been consumed |

## Filtering Purchases

Above the purchases list, there are filter buttons:
- **All**: displays all purchases
- **Active**: only products with "Active" status
- **Inactive**: expired and used up products

## Progress Bar

The progress bar visually shows how many entries remain:
- **Full (green)**: all entries available
- **Partially filled**: some entries used
- **Empty (red)**: all entries consumed

## Verification Code

After tapping "Use Product", a window displays:
- Verification code (8 characters, uppercase letters)
- Product and business details
- Business contact information (phone, email, address)
- Remaining entries counter
- Purchase and expiration dates

---

## Related

- [How to use a product: guide](../how-to-use-product.md)
- [How to view purchases: guide](../how-to-view-purchases.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.title: Shop Payments
articles.content:
# Shop Payments

## Description

Payments for products in the Spotto Shop are handled by the **TPay** system: a secure payment gateway. After confirming a purchase, you'll be redirected to the TPay page in your browser.

## Available Payment Methods

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Credit/debit card** | Visa, Mastercard, and others |
| **Instant bank transfer** | Online transfer from your bank |
| **BLIK** | BLIK code from your banking app |

## Payment Flow

1. **Purchase confirmation**: tap "Buy Now" and confirm in the app
2. **Redirect to TPay**: your browser opens with the payment gateway
3. **Complete payment**: choose a method and pay
4. **Return to app**: after payment, you automatically return to Spotto
5. **Confirmation**: the app displays a success message

## Payment Confirmation

Spotto verifies the payment in several ways:
- **Push notification**: primary method, instant confirmation
- **Automatic verification**: the app checks the status after returning from the browser
- **Status polling**: in case of delay, the app checks the status every few seconds

## Product Prices

- Prices are displayed in **PLN (Polish zloty)**
- Prices include **VAT** (value-added tax)
- The VAT rate depends on the product and is set by the seller

## Security

- Payments are processed by the certified TPay gateway
- Spotto does not store your card details
- All transactions are encrypted

---

## Related

- [How to buy a product: guide](../how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [Payment issues](../../troubleshooting/payments/payment-failed.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.title: Product Catalog
articles.content:
# Product Catalog

## Description

The Product Catalog is the main part of the "Shop" tab. It displays products offered by sports facilities registered in Spotto: passes, entry packages, and subscriptions.

## Product Card

Each product is displayed as a card with the following information:

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Title** | Product name (e.g., "Monthly gym pass") |
| **Subtitle** | Additional description (optional) |
| **Price** | Gross price (including VAT) in PLN |
| **Number of uses** | How many times you can use the product (e.g., "10 uses") |
| **Validity period** | How long the product is active (e.g., "3 Months") |
| **Business** | Name of the sports facility offering the product |
| **"Buy Now" button** | Start the product purchase |
| **Share icon** | Send a product link to a friend |

![Product card elements: Screenshot #16](../../../assets/images/shop/product-card-anatomy.png)

## Product Types

Products vary by validity period:

| Period | Description | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| **Days** | Valid for a specific number of days | 7-day pass |
| **Weeks** | Valid for a specific number of weeks | 2-week package |
| **Months** | Valid for a specific number of months | 3-month subscription |
| **Years** | Valid for a specific number of years | Annual pass |
| **Lifetime** | No expiration date | Unlimited pass |

## Products and Facilities

Products can be linked to:
- **All business facilities**: pass valid at all locations
- **Specific facilities**: pass valid only at selected locations

## Product Applications

Some products have additional properties:
- **Payable in-app**: can be used to pay for reservations directly in Spotto
- **Payable to trainer**: can be used to pay for training sessions with a trainer

---

## Related

- [How to buy a product: guide](../how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [How to filter products](../how-to-filter-products.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.title: Product Search and Filters
articles.content:
# Product Search and Filters

## Description

The Spotto Shop offers a text search bar and a filter panel to help you find the right product among offerings from many sports facilities.

## Search Bar

The search field at the top of the Shop screen lets you search by:
- Product name
- Product description
- Business name (sports facility)
- City

Results filter automatically after typing a phrase (with a short 0.5-second delay).

## Filter Panel

After tapping the filter icon, a panel opens with options:

| Filter | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| **Business** | Text | Sports facility name |
| **City** | Text | City where the facility is located |
| **Minimum price** | Number | Lower price limit (PLN) |
| **Maximum price** | Number | Upper price limit (PLN) |
| **Period** | Selection | Days, Weeks, Months, Years, Lifetime |

## Sorting Options

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Newest** | Sorted by date added (newest first) |
| **Price: ascending** | From cheapest to most expensive |
| **Price: descending** | From most expensive to cheapest |
| **Name: A-Z** | Alphabetically by name |
| **Uses: ascending** | From fewest entries |
| **Uses: descending** | From most entries |

## Business Filter (automatic)

If you navigate to the Shop from a specific facility profile, products will be automatically filtered. At the top of the screen, you'll see a banner "Products from selected facility" with a button to remove the filter.

---

## Related

- [How to filter products: guide](../how-to-filter-products.md)
- [Product Catalog](./product-catalog.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.title: How to Buy a Product (Pass/Package)
articles.content:
# How to Buy a Product (Pass/Package)

**Screen**: Shop
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Medium

## Overview

In the Spotto Shop, you can buy passes, entry packages, and subscriptions offered by sports facilities. After purchase, the product goes to "My Purchases" and you can use it when visiting the facility.

---

## Before You Start

- You must have a Spotto account and be logged in
- You need access to a payment method (card, bank transfer, or BLIK via TPay)

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Shop tab

On the bottom navigation bar, tap the **Shop** icon. You'll see a list of available products.

![Shop screen with product list: Screenshot #2](/assets/images/shop/shop-product-list.png)

### Step 2: Find the product you're interested in

Browse the product list or use the search:
- Tap the **magnifying glass** icon at the top of the screen
- Type the product name, facility name, or city
- Results filter automatically

![Product search: Screenshot #3](/assets/images/shop/shop-search.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: You can also use filters to narrow results by price, validity period, or business. [How to filter products](./how-to-filter-products.md)

### Step 3: Review product details

On the product card, you'll see:
- **Product name**: title and subtitle
- **Price**: gross amount (including VAT)
- **Number of entries**: how many times you can use it (e.g., "10 uses")
- **Validity period**: how long the product is active (e.g., "3 months")
- **Business name**: which facility offers the product

![Product card: Screenshot #4](/assets/images/shop/shop-product-card.png)

### Step 4: Tap "Buy Now"

On the product card, tap the **Buy Now** button. A confirmation window will appear with the price and product name.

![Purchase confirmation: Screenshot #5](/assets/images/shop/shop-purchase-confirm.png)

> ⚠️ **Important**: Verify the price and product name before confirming.

### Step 5: Pay via TPay

After confirmation, you'll be redirected to the TPay payment system. Available methods:
- **Credit/debit card**
- **Instant bank transfer**
- **BLIK**

![TPay payment page: Screenshot #6](/assets/images/shop/shop-tpay-payment.png)

### Step 6: Confirm the purchase

After successful payment:
1. You'll see a success message
2. The app will automatically switch to the **My Purchases** tab
3. Your new product will appear on the list with **Active** status

![Purchase confirmation: Screenshot #7](/assets/images/shop/shop-purchase-success.png)

---

## Verification

Your purchase is complete when:
- You see a success message
- The product appears in the "My Purchases" tab with **Active** status (green)
- The usage counter shows the full number of entries

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: Payment failed
**Solution**: Check your internet connection and try again. If the problem persists, try a different payment method. [More about payment issues](../troubleshooting/payments/payment-failed.md)

### Problem: Product doesn't appear after purchase
**Solution**: Wait a few seconds: the app automatically refreshes the list. If the product still doesn't appear, close and reopen the app.

### Problem: Redirect to TPay doesn't work
**Solution**: Make sure you have an up-to-date browser installed. Try again or use a different payment method.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to use a purchased product](./how-to-use-product.md)
- [How to view my purchases](./how-to-view-purchases.md)
- [How to filter products](./how-to-filter-products.md)
- [Payments: details](./features/payments.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.title: How to Filter and Search Products
articles.content:
# How to Filter and Search Products

**Screen**: Shop
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

The Spotto Shop offers a search bar and advanced filters to help you quickly find the right product. You can search by name, business, city, and also filter by price and validity period.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the search bar

On the Shop screen, tap the search field at the top of the screen. Type your search phrase: results filter automatically by:
- Product name
- Product description
- Business name
- City

![Product search bar: Screenshot #14](/assets/images/shop/product-search-bar.png)

### Step 2: Open the filter panel

Tap the **filter** icon next to the search field. The filter panel will open with filtering options.

![Filter panel: Screenshot #15](/assets/images/shop/filter-panel.png)

### Step 3: Set filters

Available filters:

| Filter | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Business** | Show products from a specific facility |
| **City** | Show products from a selected city |
| **Minimum price** | Products more expensive than the specified amount |
| **Maximum price** | Products cheaper than the specified amount |
| **Validity period** | Days, Weeks, Months, Years, or Lifetime |

### Step 4: Choose sorting

You can sort results by:

| Sorting | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Newest** | From newest products |
| **Price: ascending** | From cheapest |
| **Price: descending** | From most expensive |
| **Name: A-Z** | Alphabetically |
| **Uses: ascending** | From fewest entries |
| **Uses: descending** | From most entries |

### Step 5: Apply filters

Tap the **Apply** button or close the filter panel. The product list will refresh according to the selected criteria.

> 💡 **Tip**: To reset filters, open the panel again and tap **Clear Filters**.

---

## Filtering by Business

If you navigate to the Shop from a specific sports facility profile, products will be automatically filtered to that facility's offerings. At the top, you'll see a banner **"Products from selected facility"**. Tap **X** to remove the filter.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to buy a product](./how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [Product Catalog](./features/product-catalog.md)
- [Search and Filters: details](./features/search-filters.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.title: How to Share a Product with a Friend
articles.content:
# How to Share a Product with a Friend

**Screen**: Shop
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

Found a great pass or entry package? You can share a product link with friends. The person who receives the link will be able to open the product directly in the Spotto app.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Find the product in the Shop

Open the **Shop** tab and find the product you want to share.

### Step 2: Tap the share icon

On the product card, tap the **share** icon (upward arrow or three connected dots, depending on your system).

![Share button on product card: Screenshot #11](/assets/images/shop/share-product-button.png)

### Step 3: Choose how to send

The system share menu will open. You can send the link via:
- SMS / text message
- WhatsApp, Messenger, or another messaging app
- Email
- Copy link to clipboard

### Step 4: Friend opens the link

The person who receives the link:
- If they have the Spotto app installed: the link will open directly in the app on the product page
- If they don't have the app: the link will open a web page with product information

---

## Related Topics

- [How to buy a product](./how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [Product Catalog](./features/product-catalog.md)

---
