articles.content:
# How to Use a Purchased Product

**Screen**: Shop → My Purchases
**Role**: User
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

After purchasing a product (pass, entry package), you can use it when visiting a sports facility. The app generates a verification code that you show to facility staff.

---

## Before You Start

- You must have a purchased, active product (status: Active, green)
- The product must have remaining entries (counter > 0)

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open "My Purchases"

On the Shop screen, tap the **My Purchases** tab at the top of the screen.

![My Purchases tab: Screenshot #8](/assets/images/shop/my-purchases-tab.png)

### Step 2: Find the active product

In the purchases list, find the product with **Active** status (green label). You can use the filters:
- **All**: all purchases
- **Active**: only active products
- **Inactive**: expired or used up

![Purchases list with filters: Screenshot #9](/assets/images/shop/my-purchases-list.png)

### Step 3: Tap "Use Product"

On the active product card, tap the **Use Product** button.

> 💡 **Tip**: The button is only available when the product has "Active" status and remaining entries.

### Step 4: Show the verification code

A window will open with the verification code:

- **Verification code**: large letters and numbers, displayed in a clear font
- **Instructions**: "Show this code to facility staff"
- **Product details**: name, business, price
- **Business contact details**: phone (tap to call), email, address
- **Remaining entries**: usage counter (e.g., "7 of 10")
- **Dates**: purchase date and expiration date

![Product verification code: Screenshot #10](/assets/images/shop/product-verification-code.png)

> ⚠️ **Important**: Do not close this window until the staff member has verified your code.

### Step 5: Staff confirms usage

After the facility staff verifies the code:
1. The remaining entries counter will decrease by 1
2. You'll see the updated entry count

---

## Verification

The product was successfully used when:
- The "Remaining entries" counter decreased by 1
- You receive confirmation in the app

---

## Troubleshooting

### Problem: "Use Product" button is inactive
**Solution**: Check that the product has "Active" status and that you haven't used all entries. A product with "Expired" or "Used Up" status cannot be used.

### Problem: Verification code doesn't work with staff
**Solution**: Make sure you're showing the current code from the app. If the problem persists, contact the business: you can find their contact details in the verification code window.

---

articles.title: Troubleshooting: Shop
articles.content:
# Troubleshooting: Shop Screen

## Purchase Issues

### Payment failed

**Symptoms**: After being redirected to TPay, you see an error or are redirected back without confirmation.

**Solutions**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Make sure you have sufficient funds in your account
3. Try a different payment method (BLIK instead of card or vice versa)
4. Close and reopen the app, then try again

### TPay page doesn't open

**Symptoms**: After tapping "Buy Now", nothing happens or the browser doesn't open the page.

**Solutions**:
1. Make sure you have an up-to-date browser installed
2. Close other background apps (free up memory)
3. Restart the Spotto app

### Double charge on account

**Symptoms**: You see two charges for the same product in your bank account.

**Solutions**:
1. Check in "My Purchases" whether the product was purchased twice
2. One of the charges may be a temporary hold: it usually disappears within 24-48 hours
3. Contact customer support: support@spotto.pl

---

## Product Issues

### Product doesn't appear after purchase

**Symptoms**: Payment completed successfully, but the product isn't visible in "My Purchases".

**Solutions**:
1. Wait a few seconds: the app automatically refreshes the list
2. Switch between the "Shop" and "My Purchases" tabs
3. Close and reopen the app
4. Check the filter: make sure it's set to "All" or "Active"

### Verification code doesn't work

**Symptoms**: Facility staff cannot verify the code.

**Solutions**:
1. Make sure you're showing the current code from the app (not a screenshot)
2. Check that the product is still active (green status)
3. Check that you have remaining entries
4. Contact the business: contact details are in the verification code window

### Product expired too early

**Symptoms**: The product status changed to "Expired" even though you expected a longer validity period.

**Solutions**:
1. Check the expiration date on the purchase card: the period is counted from the purchase date
2. If the date is incorrect, contact the business or write to support@spotto.pl

---

## Search Issues

### I don't see any products

**Symptoms**: The product list is empty.

**Solutions**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Remove active filters (tap "Clear Filters")
3. Clear the search field
4. If you have a business filter enabled (banner at the top), tap X to remove it

### I can't find a product from a specific facility

**Solution**: Use the "Business" filter in the filter panel, or navigate to the Shop directly from the facility profile (on the Home screen).

---

## Related Topics

- [Payment issues: details](../troubleshooting/payments/payment-failed.md)
- [How to buy a product](./how-to-buy-pass.md)
- [FAQ: Shop](./faq.md)

articles.title: FAQ: Trainer Screen
articles.content:
# Frequently Asked Questions: Trainer Screen

## Trainer Profile

### What is the difference between an independent trainer and an employee?

An **independent trainer** runs their own business: they must provide a tax ID (NIP), business details, and configure TPay. They can create trainings on their own.

A **trainer-employee** works for a sports facility: they need fewer details, but cannot create trainings on their own. Sessions are created for them by the business.

### Can I change my type from employee to independent?

Yes: edit your trainer profile and change the type. You will need to fill in the additional data required for independent trainers.

### How do I change my hourly rate?

Edit your trainer profile and update the net or gross rate. The system will automatically calculate the other value. Note that a business may set its own rate for you independently of yours.

---

## Business Partnerships

### How can I start conducting sessions at a facility?

1. [Create a trainer profile](./how-to-create-trainer-profile.md)
2. [Search for a business and send a request](./how-to-associate-with-business.md)
3. Wait for the owner's approval
4. Once approved, you can [create trainings](./how-to-create-training.md)

### A business rejected my request: what can I do?

You can contact the business directly to learn the reason for the rejection. Once you've reached an agreement, you can send a new request.

### Can I partner with multiple businesses?

Yes: there is no limit on the number of associations. You can send requests to multiple businesses simultaneously.

---

## Trainings

### Why can't I create a training?

Most common reasons:
- You are marked as an "Employee": employees cannot create trainings on their own
- You don't have a confirmed association with any business
- You don't have an active facility reservation

### How many sessions can one training have?

There is no limit: a training can have any number of sessions on different dates.

### Can I edit a training that has enrolled participants?

Yes, but the system will display a warning about the impact of changes on participants. You must confirm the edit.

### How do I remove a participant from a training?

Open the training's participant list and tap **Remove** next to the person. [Guide](./how-to-manage-participants.md)

---

## Schedule

### Do I need to set up a schedule?

It is not required, but recommended. A schedule helps businesses and clients know when you are available.

### Does a schedule for a specific date override the general schedule?

Yes: a schedule for a specific date has higher priority than the weekly schedule.

---

## Related Topics

- [Trainer profile: details](./features/trainer-profile.md)
- [Managing trainers (business perspective)](../business/how-to-manage-trainers.md)

articles.title: Availability Schedule
articles.content:
# Availability Schedule

## Description

The schedule allows a trainer to specify the hours they are available for conducting sessions. Businesses can check your availability before scheduling a session. The schedule is visible to businesses with which you have a confirmed association.

## Schedule Types

### General Schedule (Weekly)

A recurring schedule for each week. You define it once, and it applies until changed.

| Day | Hour Range | Notes |
|-----|-----------|-------|
| **Monday through Friday** | 00:00 - 23:00 | Each day configured separately |
| **Saturday** | 00:00 - 23:00 | Separate configuration |
| **Sunday** | 00:00 - 23:00 | Separate configuration |

Each hour (hourly slot) can be marked as:
- **Available**: ready for sessions during this time
- **Unavailable**: cannot conduct sessions

To set availability, tap the appropriate slots on the weekly grid. Slots change color depending on the status.

### Specific Date Schedule

An override of the general schedule for a selected date. Useful when:
- You have a **day off** on a normally working day (e.g., holiday, vacation)
- You want to add **extra hours** on a normally free day
- You need to **change hours** for one specific day

A specific date schedule has **higher priority** than the general schedule: if you set availability for a specific day, the weekly schedule is ignored for that day.

![Trainer availability schedule: Screenshot #62](../../../assets/images/trainer/availability-schedule-detail.png)

## Assignment to Businesses

If you work with multiple businesses, you can assign hours to specific businesses:

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Color coding** | Each business has a unique color assigned on the grid |
| **Visibility** | Only businesses with a confirmed association are available for selection |
| **Default state** | New slots are marked as "unavailable" by default |
| **Multiple employers** | Different hours can be assigned to different businesses on the same day |

With color coding, you can easily see how many hours you dedicate to each business and whether schedules overlap.

## Slot Statuses

| Status | Color | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| **Available** | Green | Free slot: ready for sessions |
| **Reserved** | Blue | Sessions already scheduled: cannot be changed |
| **Unavailable** | Gray | Trainer unavailable during this time |

> 💡 **Tip**: You cannot change reserved slots to unavailable: you must first cancel the scheduled sessions.

## Configuration Examples

| Scenario | How to Set Up |
|----------|--------------|
| You work Mon-Fri 9:00-17:00 | In the weekly schedule, mark slots 9-17 as available for each weekday |
| Day off on a holiday (e.g., May 1st) | Add a schedule for May 1st and mark all slots as unavailable |
| Extra sessions on Saturday | Add a schedule for a specific Saturday and mark selected hours as available |
| Two businesses in one day | Assign mornings to business A (e.g., gym), afternoons to business B (e.g., court) |

---

## Related

- [How to set up a schedule: step-by-step guide](../how-to-set-availability.md)
- [Business associations](./business-associations.md)
- [Training management](./training-management.md)

---

articles.title: Business Associations
articles.content:
# Business Associations

## Description

The association system connects trainers with sports facilities. A trainer sends a partnership request, and the business accepts or rejects it. Once accepted, the trainer can conduct sessions at the business's facilities according to the permissions granted by the owner.

## How the Process Works

1. **You search for a business**: search by city and facility type
2. **You send a request**: the business receives a notification
3. **You wait for a decision**: the business accepts or rejects
4. **Partnership active**: after acceptance, you can conduct sessions

## Association Statuses

| Status | Color | Description | Your Actions |
|--------|-------|-------------|--------------|
| **Pending** | Yellow/orange | Request sent, business hasn't decided yet | Resend email, cancel request |
| **Confirmed** | Green | Partnership active: you can conduct sessions | Remove association |
| **Rejected** | Red | Business rejected the request (rejection reason visible) | Send a new request |

![Business associations list: Screenshot #63](../../../assets/images/trainer/business-associations-detail.png)

## Association Details

For each association, you can see detailed information:

| Information | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| **Business name** | Name of the sports business |
| **City** | Business location |
| **Avatar** | Business logo or photo |
| **Status** | Current association status |
| **Request date** | When you sent the partnership request |
| **Confirmation date** | When the business accepted (if confirmed) |
| **Rejection reason** | Why the business rejected (if rejected) |

## Permissions After Acceptance

After your request is accepted, the business sets your permissions. You cannot change them yourself: they are configured on the business side:

| Permission | Description | What It Means for You |
|------------|-------------|----------------------|
| **Can conduct own trainings** | Trainer independently creates sessions | You see the business's facilities when creating a training and can assign your sessions to them |
| **Employee** | Trainer is a full-time employee of the business | You cannot create trainings on your own: sessions must be created on the business side |
| **Max. participants** | Participant limit per training | E.g., the business allows you to conduct sessions for max. 10 people |

> ⚠️ **Important**: "Employee" and "Can conduct own trainings" statuses are mutually exclusive: if you are an employee, you cannot create trainings on your own.

## Hourly Rates

The business sets your hourly rate. The business decides how much it pays you: regardless of the rate you set in your trainer profile:

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Net rate** | Price per hour excluding VAT |
| **VAT rate** | Tax rate (0%, 8%, or 23%) |
| **Gross rate** | Price per hour including VAT (calculated automatically) |

## Business Search

The search tool lets you find businesses to partner with:

| Filter | Requirements | Description |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| **City** | Minimum 3 characters | Enter a city name to see businesses in the area |
| **Facility type** | Optional | Filter by type (gym, court, shooting range, etc.) |

You can send requests to multiple businesses simultaneously. Each business independently decides on acceptance.

## Managing Associations

| Action | When Available | Description |
|--------|---------------|-------------|
| **Resend email** | Status: Pending | Sends another notification to the business |
| **Cancel request** | Status: Pending | Withdraws the partnership request |
| **Remove association** | Status: Confirmed | Ends the partnership with the business |

> ⚠️ **Important**: Removing a confirmed association is **irreversible**. You lose access to the business's facilities. To resume the partnership, you must send a new request.

---

## Related

- [How to establish a partnership: step-by-step guide](../how-to-associate-with-business.md)
- [Managing trainers (business perspective)](../../business/how-to-manage-trainers.md)
- [Trainer associations (business perspective)](../../business/features/trainer-associations.md)
- [Availability schedule](./availability-schedule.md)

---

**Last updated**: 2026-03-29

articles.content:
# Training Management

## Description

Trainings are sessions conducted by a trainer at a sports facility. Each training can have multiple sessions on different dates, a price, a participant limit, and an association with a facility reservation.

## Training Data

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Title** | Training name (3-100 characters) |
| **Description** | Detailed description (10-1000 characters) |
| **Specialization** | Sport discipline |
| **Duration** | 15-480 minutes (in 15-min increments) |
| **Max. participants** | 1-50 people |
| **Net price** | Max 10,000 PLN |
| **Gross price** | Calculated automatically (with VAT) |

## Sessions

A training can have multiple sessions:
- Each session has a separate date
- Each session has a start and end time
- Sessions can be on different days

## Training List

On each training card, you can see:
- Title and description
- Facility (name and business)
- Date and time of the first session
- Duration (minutes)
- Number of participants (current/maximum)
- Gross price (or net if gross is unavailable)

## Employee Restrictions

Trainers with "Employee" status cannot create or edit trainings. Trainings are created for them by the business.

---

articles.content:
# How to Establish a Partnership with a Sports Facility

**Screen**: Trainer
**Role**: Trainer
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

To conduct sessions at a sports facility, you need to establish a partnership with it. Search for a business, send an association request, and wait for the owner's approval.

---

## Before You Start

- You must have a [trainer profile created](./how-to-create-trainer-profile.md)

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Business Search

On the Trainer screen, go to the **Associated Businesses** tab and tap **Search businesses**.

![Business search: Screenshot #42](/assets/images/trainer/business-search.png)

### Step 2: Search for a Business

Enter a city and optionally a facility type:
- **City**: type at least 3 characters to see suggestions
- **Facility type**: select from the list (e.g., Shooting range)

Results will show businesses with sports facilities in the selected city.

### Step 3: Select Businesses

You can send requests to multiple businesses at once:
1. Check the businesses you want to partner with
2. Tap **Send requests**

![Business selection: Screenshot #43](/assets/images/trainer/select-businesses.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: You can send requests to multiple businesses at once. Each business independently decides on approval.

### Step 4: Wait for Approval

Your requests will appear on the associations list with a **Pending** status (yellow label). The business owner must accept your request.

---

## Association Statuses

| Status | Color | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| **Pending** | Yellow | Request sent, waiting for the business's response |
| **Confirmed** | Green | Partnership active, you can conduct sessions |
| **Rejected** | Red | The business rejected the request |

## After Approval

When a business accepts your request, you will see next to your association:
- **"Employee" label**: if the business marked you as an employee
- **"Own trainings" label**: if you can create trainings on your own

## Managing Associations

On the associations list, you can:
- **Resend email**: for pending associations
- **Remove association**: end the partnership

> ⚠️ **Important**: Removing an association is irreversible. To partner again, you must send a new request.

---

## Related Topics

- [Business associations: details](./features/business-associations.md)
- [How to create a training](./how-to-create-training.md)
- [Managing trainers (business perspective)](../business/how-to-manage-trainers.md)

articles.title: How to Create a Trainer Profile
articles.content:
# How to Create a Trainer Profile

**Screen**: Trainer
**Role**: Trainer
**Difficulty**: Medium

## Overview

Your trainer profile is your business card in Spotto. It contains contact details, specializations, experience, and rates. You can operate as an independent trainer or as a facility employee.

---

## Before You Start

- You must have a Spotto account with the "Trainer" role enabled (turn it on in [profile settings](../profile/how-to-manage-roles.md))
- If you operate as an independent trainer: prepare your tax ID (NIP), REGON, and business details

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Trainer Screen

On the bottom navigation bar, tap the **Trainer** icon. If you don't have a profile yet, you will see the creation form.

### Step 2: Choose Your Trainer Type

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Independent** | Self-employed: business details and TPay required |
| **Employee** | Working for a facility: simplified form |

![Trainer type selection: Screenshot #39](/assets/images/trainer/trainer-type-selection.png)

> 💡 **Tip**: The "Employee" type requires less data, but you cannot create trainings on your own: the business does it for you.

### Step 3: Fill in Basic Details

| Field | Description | Required |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| **Display name** | Name/nickname visible to clients | Yes |
| **Email** | Contact email address | Yes |
| **Phone** | Contact number | Yes |
| **City** | Your city | Yes |
| **Address** | Business address | Yes |
| **Postal code** | Postal code | Yes |

![Trainer basic details: Screenshot #40](/assets/images/trainer/trainer-basic-info.png)

### Step 4: (Independent) Fill in Business Details

For independent trainers only:

| Field | Description | Required |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| **NIP** | 10-digit tax identification number | Yes |
| **Company name** | Business name | Yes |
| **REGON** | 9 or 14 digits | No |
| **KRS** | 10 digits | No |
| **Specializations** | Select from the list (e.g., Squash, Shooting) | Yes |
| **Description** | Description of your practice | Yes |
| **Years of experience** | Coaching experience | No |
| **Certificates** | List of certificates (comma-separated) | No |
| **Languages** | Languages you conduct sessions in | No |

### Step 5: Set Your Hourly Rate

- **Net rate**: price per hour excluding VAT
- **VAT rate**: choose: 0%, 8%, or 23%
- **Gross rate**: calculated automatically

![Hourly rate: Screenshot #41](/assets/images/trainer/trainer-hourly-rate.png)

### Step 6: (Independent) Fill in TPay Details

Independent trainers must configure payment details:

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| **Legal form** | Yes |
| **Category (MCC)** | Yes |
| **Website** | Yes |
| **Contact person first name** | Yes |
| **Contact person last name** | Yes |

### Step 7: Add an Avatar

Tap the camera icon to add a profile photo:
- Take a photo with the camera
- Choose from gallery
- The photo will be cropped to a square format

### Step 8: Save the Profile

Tap **Save**. Your trainer profile will be created.

---

## Verification

The profile has been created when:
- You see a header with your name, city, and type label (Independent/Employee)
- The profile details card is visible

articles.title: How to Create a Training
articles.content:
# How to Create a Training

**Screen**: Trainer
**Role**: Trainer
**Difficulty**: Medium

## Overview

A training is a session that you conduct at a sports facility. You can create trainings with multiple sessions on different dates, set prices, maximum participant count, and link the training to a facility reservation.

---

## Before You Start

- You must have a [trainer profile](./how-to-create-trainer-profile.md)
- You must have a [confirmed business partnership](./how-to-associate-with-business.md) with the "Own trainings" permission
- You need an active facility reservation

> ⚠️ **Important**: Trainers with "Employee" status cannot create trainings on their own: trainings are created by the business.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the "Trainings" Tab

On the Trainer screen, go to the **Trainings** tab and tap **Create training**.

### Step 2: Fill in Training Details

| Field | Description | Required |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| **Title** | Training name (3-100 characters) | Yes |
| **Description** | Detailed description (10-1000 characters) | Yes |
| **Specialization** | Sport discipline | Yes |
| **Duration** | 15-480 minutes (in 15-min increments) | Yes |
| **Max. participants** | 1-50 people | Yes |
| **Net price** | Price per training (max 10,000 PLN) | Yes |
| **VAT rate** | 0%, 8%, or 23% | Yes |
| **Gross price** | Calculated automatically | : |

![Training creation form: Screenshot #44](/assets/images/trainer/training-form.png)

### Step 3: Select a Facility Reservation

From the list of your upcoming reservations, select the facility where the training will take place. The list shows:
- Facility and business name
- Reservation dates
- Available time slots

![Reservation selection: Screenshot #45](/assets/images/trainer/select-reservation.png)

### Step 4: Set Session Dates and Times

A training can have multiple sessions:
1. Select a date from the calendar
2. Set the start and end time
3. (Optionally) Add more dates

> 💡 **Tip**: You cannot select dates that have already passed. The end time must be later than the start time.

![Session configuration: Screenshot #46](/assets/images/trainer/training-sessions.png)

### Step 5: Save the Training

Tap **Save**. The training will be created and will appear on the trainings list with session count information.

---

## Editing a Training

To edit an existing training:
1. On the trainings list, tap the edit icon
2. Change the necessary details
3. Confirm the changes

> ⚠️ **Important**: Editing a training with enrolled participants requires confirmation: changes may affect participants.

---

## Related Topics

- [How to manage participants](./how-to-manage-participants.md)
- [Training management: details](./features/training-management.md)
- [How to establish a partnership with a facility](./how-to-associate-with-business.md)

articles.title: How to Set Up an Availability Schedule
articles.content:
# How to Set Up an Availability Schedule

**Screen**: Trainer
**Role**: Trainer
**Difficulty**: Easy

## Overview

The availability schedule informs businesses and clients when you are free. You can set a general weekly schedule and override it for specific dates.

---

## Steps

### Step 1: Open the Schedule

On the Trainer screen, find the **Availability Schedule** section.

### Step 2: Set the General Schedule

Configure availability for three day types:

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Weekdays** | Monday through Friday |
| **Saturday** | Saturday |
| **Sunday** | Sunday |

Select the hours (from 00:00 to 23:00) during which you are available.

![Trainer weekly schedule: Screenshot #48](/assets/images/trainer/trainer-weekly-schedule.png)

### Step 3: (Optional) Set Availability for a Specific Date

1. Select the **Specific date** mode
2. Choose a date from the calendar
3. Select the availability hours

A schedule for a specific date has higher priority than the general schedule.

### Step 4: (Optional) Assign Hours to Businesses

If you work with multiple businesses, you can assign specific hours to specific businesses. This way, businesses can see when you are available for them.

### Step 5: Save the Schedule

Tap **Save** to confirm the changes.

---

## Related Topics

- [Availability schedule: details](./features/availability-schedule.md)
- [How to establish a partnership with a facility](./how-to-associate-with-business.md)

articles.content:
# Troubleshooting

Having trouble with the Spotto app? Find a solution below or contact us at: **support@spotto.pl**.

## Problem Categories

### Login & Account
- [I can't log in](./authentication/login-failed.md) : wrong password, locked account
- [I forgot my password](./authentication/forgot-password.md) : password reset
- [Account locked](./authentication/account-locked.md) : unlocking access

### Payments
- [Payment failed](./payments/payment-failed.md) : TPay errors, rejected transaction
- [Refund issues](./payments/refund-issues.md) : waiting time, refund status
- [TPay errors](./payments/tpay-errors.md) : redirect, timeout, other errors

### Bookings
- [Booking failed](./bookings/booking-failed.md) : unable to book
- [I can't cancel a booking](./bookings/cannot-cancel.md) : cancellation policy
- [Time slot unavailable](./bookings/time-slot-unavailable.md) : no available slots

### App Issues
- [App crashes](./app-issues/app-crash.md) : crashes and freezes
- [Slow performance](./app-issues/slow-performance.md) : performance optimization
- [Sync issues](./app-issues/sync-issues.md) : data not updating

---

## Quick Fixes

Before looking for a detailed solution, try these steps:

1. **Check your internet connection** : most features require internet
2. **Close and reopen the app** : fixes many temporary issues
3. **Update the app** : make sure you have the latest version
4. **Restart your phone** : helps with memory issues

---

## Contact Support

If you haven't found a solution:
- **Email**: support@spotto.pl
- **Complaints**: reklamacje@spotto.pl
- **Company**: SOLID LABS PSA, Mogilska 43, Krakow

---

articles.title: App Crashes
articles.content:
# App Crashes

## Problem

The Spotto app closes unexpectedly, becomes unresponsive, or displays a blank screen.

## Solutions

### Step 1: Restart the app

Close the Spotto app (force close) and reopen it.

**Android**: Multitask button → swipe Spotto up
**iPhone**: Swipe up from the bottom to the middle of the screen → swipe Spotto up

### Step 2: Update the app

Make sure you have the latest version:
- **Android**: Google Play Store → Spotto → Update
- **iPhone**: App Store → Spotto → Update

### Step 3: Restart your phone

Turn your phone off and on again. This resolves memory issues.

### Step 4: Clear cache (Android)

1. Settings → Apps → Spotto
2. Storage → Clear cache

### Step 5: Reinstall

If the problem persists:
1. Uninstall the app
2. Reinstall from the store
3. Log in with your credentials

> 💡 **Tip**: Your data (bookings, purchases, profile) is linked to your account, not the app : you won't lose it after reinstalling.

---

## Reporting Bugs

If you enabled **Crash Reports** in [privacy settings](../../profile/how-to-manage-privacy.md), the app will automatically send a crash report.

You can also email support@spotto.pl with a description of:
- What you were doing in the app before the crash
- Phone model and OS version
- Spotto app version

---

## Related Topics

- [Slow performance](./slow-performance.md)
- [Sync issues](./sync-issues.md)

articles.title: Slow App Performance
articles.content:
# Slow App Performance

## Problem

The Spotto app runs slowly : screens take a long time to load, buttons respond with a delay.

## Solutions

### Check your internet connection

Slow connection = slow app. Check:
- Wi-Fi signal strength
- Mobile data coverage
- Try switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data

### Close unnecessary apps

Other apps running in the background can use up memory and slow down Spotto. Close unnecessary apps.

### Restart your phone

Restarting your phone frees up memory and can significantly improve performance.

### Update the app

Newer versions may contain performance improvements:
- **Android**: Google Play Store → Spotto → Update
- **iPhone**: App Store → Spotto → Update

### Check phone storage

Lack of free space on your phone can slow down all apps. Free up at least 500 MB of space.

---

## Related Topics

- [App crashes](./app-crash.md)
- [Sync issues](./sync-issues.md)

articles.title: Sync Issues
articles.content:
# Sync Issues

## Problem

Data in the app is not updating : e.g., after purchasing a product you don't see it in "My Purchases", a booking doesn't appear, or profile changes are not saved.

## Solutions

### Refresh the screen

Swipe down from the top of the list (pull-to-refresh) to force a data refresh.

### Switch between tabs

Go to a different tab and come back : this forces the data to reload.

### Close and reopen the app

Close the app completely (force close) and reopen it.

### Check your internet connection

An unstable internet connection prevents synchronization. Check:
- Wi-Fi or mobile data connection
- Try opening a website in your browser

### Log out and log back in

As a last resort:
1. Open Settings → Log out
2. Log back in with your credentials
3. Data should reload fresh

---

## Push Notifications

If you're not receiving notifications about purchases and bookings:
1. Check that push notifications are enabled in [privacy settings](../../profile/how-to-manage-privacy.md)
2. Check your phone's system settings : make sure Spotto has permission to send notifications

---

## Related Topics

- [App crashes](./app-crash.md)
- [Slow performance](./slow-performance.md)

## Problem

Your account has been temporarily or permanently locked and you cannot log in.

## Most Common Causes

### Too many failed login attempts

**Solution**:
1. Wait 15-30 minutes
2. Try logging in again
3. If you don't remember your password : [reset it](./forgot-password.md)

### Security lock

If the system detected suspicious activity on your account:
1. Check your email inbox : you should have received a notification
2. If it wasn't you trying to log in : change your password immediately
3. Contact support@spotto.pl to unlock your account

---

## Contact Support

If you cannot unlock your account on your own:
- **Email**: support@spotto.pl
- Provide your account email address and a description of the problem

---

articles.content:
# I Forgot My Password

## Problem

You don't remember your Spotto account password.

## Solution

### Step 1: Open the login screen

Launch the Spotto app. On the login screen, tap **Forgot password**.

### Step 2: Enter your email address

Type the email address associated with your account and tap **Send link**.

### Step 3: Check your inbox

A password reset link will be sent to your email address. Check:
- Your inbox
- Spam / Junk folder

### Step 4: Set a new password

Open the link from the email and set a new password.

### Step 5: Log in

Return to the app and log in with your new password.

---

## Troubleshooting

### Email doesn't arrive
- Check your Spam folder
- Make sure you entered the correct email address
- Wait a few minutes and try again
- Check if an account with that email exists

### Link expired
- Reset links have a limited validity period
- Generate a new link by repeating the steps from the beginning

---

articles.title: I Can't Log In
articles.content:
# I Can't Log In

## Problem

You cannot log in to the Spotto app : you see an error or the login screen doesn't accept your credentials.

## Most Common Causes and Solutions

### Wrong password

**Symptoms**: Message "Invalid email or password"

**Solution**:
1. Check that Caps Lock is not enabled
2. Make sure you are entering the correct email address
3. If you don't remember your password : [reset it](./forgot-password.md)

### Account doesn't exist

**Symptoms**: Message about a non-existent account

**Solution**:
1. Check if the registration was completed
2. Make sure you are using the same email address as during registration
3. If the account doesn't exist, register again

### No internet connection

**Symptoms**: Loading never finishes, timeout

**Solution**:
1. Check Wi-Fi or mobile data connection
2. Open a browser and check if other websites work
3. Switch between Wi-Fi and mobile data

### Too many failed attempts

**Symptoms**: Message about temporary lock

**Solution**:
1. Wait a few minutes and try again
2. If the problem persists : [reset your password](./forgot-password.md)

---

## Next Steps

If the above solutions didn't help:
- Make sure you have the latest version of the app
- Uninstall and reinstall the app
- Contact support@spotto.pl

---

## Related Topics

- [I forgot my password](./forgot-password.md)
- [Account locked](./account-locked.md)

# Booking Failed

## Problem

You are trying to book a sports facility, but the booking ends with an error.

## Most Common Causes and Solutions

### Time slot already taken

**Symptoms**: Message about slot unavailability

**Solution**: The selected slot was booked by another user. Choose a different time or day.

### Payment issue

**Symptoms**: Booking is not confirmed after payment

**Solution**: See [Payment failed](../payments/payment-failed.md)

### No internet connection

**Solution**: Check your connection and try again.

### Facility not accepting bookings

**Symptoms**: No available slots

**Solution**:
1. Check the facility's schedule : it may be closed on the selected date
2. Try a different day
3. Contact the facility directly

---

## Pending Payments

If the payment was interrupted, the booking will go to the **Pending Payments** section on the Home screen. You can complete the payment from there.

---

articles.title: I Can't Cancel a Booking
articles.content:
# I Can't Cancel a Booking

## Problem

You want to cancel a booking, but the option is not available or an error is displayed.

## Most Common Causes

### Too late to cancel

**Symptoms**: The "Cancel" button is inactive or a message is displayed

**Explanation**: Many facilities do not allow cancellation less than 48 hours before the booking time.

**Solution**: Contact the sports facility directly : you can find the contact details in the booking details.

### Booking has already started

**Explanation**: You cannot cancel a booking that is already in progress or has already taken place.

### Technical issues

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Close and reopen the app
3. Try again

---

## Cancellation Policy

| Time until booking | Refund |
|-------------------|--------|
| More than 48 hours | Full refund minus 10% processing fee |
| Less than 48 hours | Depends on the facility's policy |
| After the booking time | No refund |

> ⚠️ **Important**: Specific cancellation policies may vary depending on the sports facility.

---

articles.title: Time Slot Unavailable
articles.content:
# Time Slot Unavailable

## Problem

You want to book a facility, but the selected time slot is unavailable or grayed out.

## Most Common Causes

### Time slot taken by another user

Someone booked this slot before you.

**Solution**: Choose a different time on the same day or check availability on another day.

### Facility closed at the selected time

The facility owner may have closed the facility for that day (holiday, maintenance break, etc.).

**Solution**: Check a different day. Opening hours may vary on weekends and holidays.

### Minimum booking length

Some facilities require a minimum booking of 2 slots (2 hours).

**Solution**: Select the required minimum number of slots.

---

## Tips

- **Gray slots** = taken or unavailable
- **Green slots** = available for booking
- Check several days to find an available slot
- Peak hours (6:00 PM - 9:00 PM) get booked the fastest

---

## Related Topics

- [Booking failed](./booking-failed.md)

articles.title: Payment Failed
articles.content:
# Payment Failed

## Problem

You are trying to pay for a booking or product, but the payment ends with an error.

## Most Common Causes and Solutions

### Insufficient funds

**Symptoms**: TPay rejects the transaction

**Solution**: Check your bank account balance and try again or use a different payment method.

### Payment card error

**Symptoms**: Message about card rejection

**Solution**:
1. Check that the card details are correct
2. Make sure the card has not expired
3. Check if you have reached your transaction limit
4. Contact your bank if the problem persists

### BLIK issue

**Symptoms**: BLIK code is not accepted

**Solution**:
1. Make sure the code is current (BLIK is valid for 2 minutes)
2. Generate a new code in your banking app
3. Check if you have BLIK payments enabled at your bank

### Redirect to TPay not working

**Symptoms**: Browser does not open the TPay page

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Close other apps in the background
3. Update the Spotto app
4. Try again

### Timeout / time expired

**Symptoms**: Payment session expired

**Solution**:
1. Start the payment from the beginning
2. Make sure you have a stable internet connection
3. Have your payment details ready before starting

---

## After a Failed Payment

- Your bank account **should not be charged** after a failed payment
- If you see a charge despite a failed transaction : it may be a temporary hold that will disappear within 24-48 hours
- The booking or product **will not be purchased** : you can try again

---

## Contact Support

If the problem persists:
- **Email**: support@spotto.pl
- Provide: date and time of the transaction, amount, payment method, error description

---

## Related Topics

- [Refund issues](./refund-issues.md)
- [TPay errors](./tpay-errors.md)
- [How to buy a product](../../shop/how-to-buy-pass.md)

articles.title: Refund Issues
articles.content:
# Refund Issues

## Problem

You are expecting a refund for a canceled booking or product, but the funds have not returned to your account.

## Refund Policy

### Bookings

- Canceling a booking **more than 48 hours** in advance : full refund minus processing fee (10%)
- Canceling **less than 48 hours** before the booking : refund may not apply (depends on the facility's policy)
- Details can be found in the sports facility's terms and conditions

### Products (passes)

- Refund policies are set individually by each sports facility
- Contact the business directly

## Waiting Time

| Payment method | Refund time |
|---------------|-------------|
| Payment card | 3-10 business days |
| Bank transfer | 1-5 business days |
| BLIK | 1-3 business days |

## What To Do

1. **Check the booking status** : make sure the cancellation was confirmed
2. **Wait** : refunds can take up to 10 business days
3. **Check your bank statement** : the refund may appear under a different date
4. **Contact the facility** : you can find the contact details in the booking details
5. **Report the issue** : email support@spotto.pl with the booking number

---

## Related Topics

articles.title: TPay Errors
articles.content:
# TPay Errors

## Problem

During payment via TPay, you see an error, the page doesn't load, or the redirect doesn't work.

## Most Common Errors

### TPay page doesn't load

**Solution**:
1. Check your internet connection
2. Close the browser and try again
3. Clear your browser cache

### "Session expired" on the TPay page

**Solution**:
1. Return to the Spotto app
2. Start the payment from the beginning
3. Try to complete the payment within a few minutes

### Error after successful payment

**Symptoms**: TPay confirms the payment, but the app doesn't update the status

**Solution**:
1. Wait a few seconds : the app verifies the payment in the background
2. Close and reopen the app
3. Check the "My Purchases" or "Bookings" tab
4. If the product/booking doesn't appear after a few minutes : contact support@spotto.pl

### Redirect from TPay doesn't return to the app

**Solution**:
1. Manually open the Spotto app
2. Check if the booking or product was registered
3. If not : wait a few minutes and refresh

---

## Information for Support

If you contact support@spotto.pl, provide:
- Date and time of the transaction
- Amount
- Payment method
- Screenshot of the error (if available)

---

## Related Topics

- [Payment failed](./payment-failed.md)
- [Refund issues](./refund-issues.md)
